title: Dashboard loads current-month overview after successful OTP verification
description: Verifies that completing the OTP sign-in flow lands the user on the dashboard and shows current-month summary and chart content.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill a valid email address into the email field
Request an OTP
Fill a valid 6-digit OTP into the OTP field
Submit the OTP for verification
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify current-month income, expense, and balance summaries and an income-vs-expense chart are displayed

title: Dashboard is gated behind OTP login
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated user attempting to access the dashboard is prompted to authenticate before the dashboard is accessible.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Wait for the authentication page to load
Verify the authentication flow is shown instead of the dashboard overview

title: Dashboard is gated behind OTP login for transactions ledger
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated user attempting to access the transactions page is prompted to authenticate before the ledger is accessible.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard/transactions
Wait for the authentication page to load
Verify the authentication flow is shown instead of the transactions ledger

title: Dashboard shows current-month summary and chart by default
description: Verifies that a signed-in user viewing the dashboard sees the default current-month summary cards and analyzer chart.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill a valid email address into the email field
Request an OTP
Fill a valid 6-digit OTP into the OTP field
Submit the OTP for verification
Wait for the dashboard to load
Verify current-month income, expense, and balance summaries are displayed
Verify an income-vs-expense chart is displayed

title: Create a transaction and see it appear in the ledger
description: Verifies that creating a new transaction with category, type, amount, and date saves successfully and appears in the transaction ledger.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill a valid email address into the email field
Request an OTP
Fill a valid 6-digit OTP into the OTP field
Submit the OTP for verification
Click the navigation entry to open the transactions ledger
Initiate creating a new transaction
Select a transaction category
Select a transaction type
Fill 123.45 into the amount field
Fill a valid date into the date field
Save the transaction
Verify a new transaction row appears in the ledger

title: Changing month updates dashboard summaries and chart
description: Verifies that switching the dashboard time context to a different month updates the summary cards and chart to reflect that month.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill a valid email address into the email field
Request an OTP
Fill a valid 6-digit OTP into the OTP field
Submit the OTP for verification
Open the month/time-context control
Select a different month
Verify the dashboard summary cards update for the selected month
Verify the dashboard chart updates for the selected month

title: Edit a transaction and see updated details and metadata
description: Verifies that editing an existing transaction updates its displayed values and shows updated audit metadata.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill a valid email address into the email field
Request an OTP
Fill a valid 6-digit OTP into the OTP field
Submit the OTP for verification
Click the navigation entry to open the transactions ledger
Initiate creating a new transaction
Select a transaction category
Select a transaction type
Fill 50.00 into the amount field
Fill a valid date into the date field
Save the transaction
Open the created transaction for editing
Fill 75.00 into the amount field
Select a different transaction category
Save the changes
Verify the edited transaction row reflects the updated details
Verify updated audit metadata is visible for the transaction

title: Delete a transaction with confirmation and see it removed
description: Verifies that deleting a transaction after confirming intent removes it from the ledger.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill a valid email address into the email field
Request an OTP
Fill a valid 6-digit OTP into the OTP field
Submit the OTP for verification
Click the navigation entry to open the transactions ledger
Initiate creating a new transaction
Select a transaction category
Select a transaction type
Fill 20.00 into the amount field
Fill a valid date into the date field
Save the transaction
Request to delete the created transaction
Confirm deletion intent
Verify the transaction is removed from the ledger

title: Navigate from dashboard to transactions ledger
description: Verifies that a signed-in user can navigate from the dashboard to the transaction ledger to inspect entries.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill a valid email address into the email field
Request an OTP
Fill a valid 6-digit OTP into the OTP field
Submit the OTP for verification
Click the navigation entry to open the transactions ledger
Verify the transaction ledger is displayed

title: Update report preview when date range changes
description: Verifies a user can change the date range on the reports page and the category distribution preview updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Submit the request to get a sign-in code
Fill in a valid 6-digit OTP code into the OTP field
Submit the OTP verification
Click the navigation link to open reports
Select a different valid date range in the report filters
Verify the category distribution pie chart reflects the selected date range
Verify the report summary table reflects the selected date range

title: Drill into a report category and return to main view
description: Verifies a user can drill into a category slice to see a subcategory breakdown and then return to the main category chart view.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Submit the request to get a sign-in code
Fill in a valid 6-digit OTP code into the OTP field
Submit the OTP verification
Click the navigation link to open reports
Click a category slice in the pie chart preview
Verify a subcategory breakdown view is displayed
Click the control to return to the main report view
Verify the main category distribution pie chart view is displayed

title: Incorrect or expired OTP shows a retry error
description: Verifies that submitting an invalid OTP shows a validation error and keeps the user in the authentication flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill a valid email address into the email field
Request an OTP
Fill an invalid 6-digit OTP into the OTP field
Submit the OTP for verification
Verify an OTP validation error is visible
Verify the user is not signed in and remains in the authentication flow

title: Export the filtered report as PDF
description: Verifies a user can export the currently filtered report to PDF and a PDF download is initiated.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Submit the request to get a sign-in code
Fill in a valid 6-digit OTP code into the OTP field
Submit the OTP verification
Click the navigation link to open reports
Select a valid date range in the report filters
Initiate export to PDF
Verify a report export confirmation or progress indicator is visible
Verify a PDF file download is initiated

title: Export the filtered report as Excel
description: Verifies a user can export the currently filtered report to Excel and an Excel download is initiated.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Submit the request to get a sign-in code
Fill in a valid 6-digit OTP code into the OTP field
Submit the OTP verification
Click the navigation link to open reports
Select a valid date range in the report filters
Initiate export to Excel
Verify a report export confirmation or progress indicator is visible
Verify an Excel file download is initiated

title: Keep filters applied when returning from category drill-down
description: Verifies that after drilling into a category and returning to the main view, the previously selected date range remains applied.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Submit the request to get a sign-in code
Fill in a valid 6-digit OTP code into the OTP field
Submit the OTP verification
Click the navigation link to open reports
Select a specific valid date range in the report filters
Click a category slice in the pie chart preview
Click the control to return to the main report view
Verify the report preview still reflects the previously selected date range
Verify the report summary table still reflects the previously selected date range

title: Client-side validation blocks invalid transaction creation
description: Verifies that leaving required fields blank or entering an invalid amount shows client-side validation errors and prevents saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill a valid email address into the email field
Request an OTP
Fill a valid 6-digit OTP into the OTP field
Submit the OTP for verification
Click the navigation entry to open the transactions ledger
Initiate creating a new transaction
Fill -1 into the amount field
Save the transaction
Verify validation errors are visible for the invalid or missing fields
Verify the transaction is not added to the ledger

title: Handle empty-state reports for a date range with no data
description: Verifies selecting a date range with no transactions shows an empty state and does not break the report preview.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Submit the request to get a sign-in code
Fill in a valid 6-digit OTP code into the OTP field
Submit the OTP verification
Click the navigation link to open reports
Select a date range far enough in the past or future that is likely to contain no transactions
Verify an empty state message is visible for the report results
Verify the page remains usable with filters still interactive
